title: Budget Implementation Act, 1999
description: Budget Implementation Act, 1999 (Budget Implementation Act, 1999). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Budget Implementation Act, 1999 .

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 13 (1) Sections 2 to 11 are deemed to have come into force on April 1, 1999. (2) Section 12 is deemed to have come into force on March 31, 1999.

provisions.title: Coming into force
provisions.content: 24.1 Sections 20 to 24 come into force on a day to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council. Return to footnote * [Note: Sections 20 to 24 in force August 27, 1999, see SI/99-100.]

provisions.chapter: DIVISION 3 Yukon First Nations Self-Government Act
provisions.title: Coming into force

provisions.chapter: PART 7 Goods and Services Tax Credit
